# Finch Theory
> Strategic growth consultancy working with ambitious organisations to identify hidden value, activate opportunities and convert potential into measurable growth.

## About
Finch Theory is a London-based strategic growth consultancy founded by Matthew Steiner. It works with founders and leadership teams of growing businesses across three service pillars: Relationship Capital, Workforce Performance, and Fractional Growth Director.

## Services

### Relationship Capital
Transforming existing relationships into structured commercial assets that generate introductions, partnerships and revenue. Most businesses are sitting on untapped growth within their existing network. Finch Theory identifies, structures and activates that value.

### Workforce Performance
Removing the hidden commercial cost of financial pressure within your team. Measurable outcomes, not management theory. Financial pressure inside a workforce quietly costs businesses in productivity, retention and culture.

### Fractional Growth Director
Senior commercial capability on a retained or project basis. Creating opportunities, not just advising on them. Ideal for businesses that need experienced commercial leadership without the full-time overhead.

## Who We Help
- Founders and leadership teams of growing SMEs
- Businesses with strong relationships but no structured commercial framework
- Organisations experiencing hidden workforce performance costs
- Companies needing senior commercial expertise on a fractional basis

## Founder
Matthew Steiner -- Founder of Finch Theory. Over 20 years in financial services and commercial growth. Also co-founder and Managing Director of Aetas Partners and Aetas Wealth.

## Contact
- Email: matthew@finchtheory.com
- Website: https://finchtheory.com

## How We Work
Four stages: Discovery, Strategy, Activation, Growth. No cost, no obligation until proposal agreed.

## Location
London, United Kingdom
